children.heading: Caribbean
children.label: 1 Caribbean
children.text: The term “Caribbean” includes Puerto Rico and the United States Virgin Islands.

children.label: A
children.text: protection and management of neotropical migratory bird populations;

children.label: B
children.text: maintenance, management, protection, and restoration of neotropical migratory bird habitat;

children.heading: Fund
children.label: 3 Fund
children.text: The term “Fund” means the Neotropical Migratory Bird Conservation Fund established by .section 6108(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 4 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
